| [US]{.bold .tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="United States"} [3D]{.tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="tridimensional"} units | [cz&sup3;](#cz3){.bold .tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="cubic centizem"} | [cm&sup3;](#cm3){.bold .tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="cubic centimeter"} |
| -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [1.2549]{.colorDrop} [drops](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Drop_(unit))                                                                            |  1                                                                                    |  0.064                                                                                  |
| [0.9535]{.colorCuIn} [cu. inches](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cubic_inch)                                                                        |  244.140625                                                                           |  15.625                                                                                 |
| [1.0821]{.colorFlOz} [table🥄](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tablespoon)                                                                           |  250                                                                                  |  16                                                                                     |
| [1.0821]{.colorFlOz} [ounces](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ounce#Fluid_ounce)                                                                     |  500                                                                                  |  32                                                                                     |
| [1.0821]{.colorFlOz} [🍷glasses](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wine_glass#Capacity_measure)                                                        |  1000                                                                                 |  64                                                                                     |
| [0.9468]{.colorGall} [cups](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cup_(unit))                                                                              |  3500                                                                                 |  224                                                                                    |
| [0.9468]{.colorGall} [pints](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pint)                                                                                   |  7000                                                                                 |  448                                                                                    |
| [0.9468]{.colorGall} [quarts](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quart)                                                                                 |  14000                                                                                |  896                                                                                    |
| [0.9468]{.colorGall} [gallons](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gallon)                                                                               |  56000                                                                                |  3584                                                                                   |
| [0.9535]{.colorCuIn} [cu. feet](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cubic_foot)                                                                          |  421875                                                                               |  27000                                                                                  |
| [1.0735]{.colorBarr} [kegs](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Keg#Specifications_for_a_U.S._1%E2%81%842_barrel_keg)                                    |  1000000                                                                              |  64000                                                                                  |
| [1.0735]{.colorBarr} [barrels](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Barrel_(unit))                                                                        |  2000000                                                                              |  128000                                                                                 |
| [1.0735]{.colorBarr} [hogsheads](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hogshead)                                                                           |  4000000                                                                              |  256000                                                                                 |
| [0.9535]{.colorCuIn} [cu. yards](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cubic_yard)                                                                         |  11390625                                                                             |  729000                                                                                 |
